mapper.select: SELECT status_seq, TDAY, WORK_INDCT_NUM, CUST_NM, EQUT_CD, PROD_NM, MAIN_WORK_INDCT_NUM, DATE_FORMAT(INSERT_DTTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS INSERT_DTTM, DATE_FORMAT(SCAN_START_DTTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS SCAN_START_DTTM, DATE_FORMAT(START_DTTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS START_DTTM, DATE_FORMAT(END_DTTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS END_DTTM FROM v_jacup WHERE TDAY >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND EQUT_CD = #{equtCd} AND START_DTTM IS NULL ORDER BY WORK_INDCT_NUM ASC LIMIT 5
